description: Polish subsidiary of Docplanner Group operating ZnanyLekarz brand. Leading healthcare marketplace in Poland connecting patients with doctors through booking platform and practice management software.
business_model: B2B - SaaS to doctors/clinics; B2C marketplace for patient bookings
key_investors: One Peak Partners, Goldman Sachs, Goldentree, Vostok New Global
competitive_advantage: Market leader in Poland, strong brand recognition, comprehensive platform

varden_fit.rationale: Distribution channel in Poland - could integrate occupational health services
